description_long: This armchair features a modern, boxy silhouette with a sturdy wooden frame and wide, flat armrests. The seat and backrest are upholstered in black leather or leather-like material, both of which are deeply tufted with buttons, creating a plush, cushioned appearance. The backrest is straight and slightly reclined, providing ergonomic support, while the seat cushion is thick and inviting. The armrests and legs are constructed from dark-stained wood, with the legs extending straight down and the back featuring a slatted wooden design. The overall look is both contemporary and classic, suitable for urban interiors or stylish outdoor settings. The materials and construction suggest durability and comfort, making it ideal for public waiting areas, lobbies, or upscale parks.
description: A modern armchair with a dark wooden frame, wide flat armrests, and black tufted leather cushions. The design is both sturdy and plush, blending comfort with contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat wooden armrests, tufted black leather seat and backrest, and the overall boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the seat and back cushions, the straight wooden legs, and the slight recline of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the slatted wooden backrest design and the full width of the armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and leg structure.
attribute_backrest_style: straight, medium-height, tufted with buttons, slightly reclined
attribute_leg_type: straight, rectangular, dark wooden legs integrated with the frame
